text.title: Test as Living Documentation Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals onto a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Do stable AC IDs exist in a tracker?

conclusion.verdict: Install AC discipline first, then return.

branch.question: Will a business stakeholder actually read the generated docs?
Is a BDD framework installed or adoptable?

text.example: Worked path from root-question to conclusion.
